prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis on formaldehyde was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase. The most electrophilic site is the carbon atom with a Fukui + value of 0.70839, and the most nucleophilic site is the oxygen atom with a Fukui - value of 0.46742. The analysis indicates the sites most susceptible to electrophilic and nucleophilic attack, respectively.
